title: Performance
description: KPI scorecards from real ERP data — 0–100, color-zoned. KPIs without a data source show “—”, never estimated.

brief.title: AI Management brief
brief.notConfigured: The AI brief isn’t configured — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on the API to enable the Claude-generated narrative (top movers, deviations, missed deadlines, revenue opportunities, recommended action). Until then the computed rollup above is the source of truth — no invented summary.
brief.empty: No brief yet — click “Generate brief” to summarize the current scorecards via Claude.

emptyState.title: No scorecards for this period yet.
emptyState.description: Scorecards appear once KPI values are recorded for the week (auto-collected from ERP data or entered by a manager).

recordDialog.title: Record a KPI value
recordDialog.description: For KPIs with no automatic source (manager-entered). Auto-collected KPIs aren’t listed — they come from real ERP data.
recordDialog.pickError: Pick an employee and a KPI.
